---
title: "Sharing Your Synthesis Story"
---

### {{< fa person-digging >}} \[Overview Under Construction\]

Check back later

:::{.callout-note icon="false" collapse="false"}
### {{< fa file-pen >}} Pre-Class Preparation

- {{< fa screwdriver-wrench >}} TBD

:::

{{< include activities/elevator-pitch-p02.qmd >}}

{{< include topics/communicate-jargon.qmd >}}
{{< include activities/elevator-pitch-p03.qmd >}}

{{< include topics/communicate-audiences.qmd >}}
{{< include activities/elevator-pitch-p04.qmd >}}
